name: Altair Engineering Inc.
h1: Altair Engineering's GCC footprint in India
lede: Altair Engineering runs three centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai and New Delhi, covering GBS, engineering & design and IT, built over eight years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Altair Engineering office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Altair Engineering Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Altair Engineering runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, New Delhi), covering GBS, engineering & design and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Altair Engineering's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai and New Delhi, spanning GBS, engineering & design and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 41 decision-makers, in one profile.
